title: Starting Epson RC+ 8.0
description:
Starting Epson RC+ 8.0

Starting Epson RC+ 8.0

There are three ways to start Epson RC+ 8.0. You can also configure the mode that Epson RC+ 8.0 starts in.

Start Method 1

Double-click the [Epson RC+ 8.0] icon on the desktop.

Start Method 2

1. Click the Windows [Start] button.

2. Select [Epson RC+ 8.0]-[Epson RC+ 8.0].

Start Method 3

Configure Epson RC+ 8.0 to start automatically after Windows starts.

For details, refer to 4.2.7 Auto Start.

NOTE:  When using the RC+ API option, you do not need to start Epson RC+ 8.0. The library created with the RC+ API option will load Epson RC+ 8.0 automatically in the background.
